# Weather Fit

> Weather Fit is an iOS weather app that answers the everyday question "what should I wear today?" It combines accurate weather forecasts with personalized outfit recommendations through a customizable character that dresses according to current and forecasted conditions. Available on iPhone, iPad, and Apple Watch.

## App

- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/apple-store/id1194408342): Download Weather Fit for iPhone and iPad. Free with optional Premium subscription.

## Website

- [Home](https://weatherfit.com/): Overview of features including outfit recommendations, widgets, character customization, and weather data.
- [FAQ](https://weatherfit.com/faq): Answers to common questions about pricing, devices, languages, subscriptions, and how outfit suggestions work.
- [Press Kit](https://weatherfit.com/press-kit): Press resources including app highlights, pricing, media coverage, creator bio, and downloadable assets.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://weatherfit.com/privacy-policy): How Weather Fit collects, uses, and safeguards user data.
- [Terms of Use](https://weatherfit.com/terms-and-conditions): Terms governing use of the Weather Fit app, including subscriptions and intellectual property.
